title: Medical device use and safety in pregnancy and pediatric care - Canada.ca
content:
## Pregnancy and pediatric care
Some medical devices are intended only for use during pregnancy or nursing, or in pediatric care. Other medical devices are intended for use in the general population, including during pregnancy or nursing, or in children up to 18 years of age.
Read more about the types of devices used in pregnancy and pediatric care.

About infant incubators and radiant warmers, risk of falls, managing risks

### Tubed medical devices and children
